name: Black-Eyed Pea Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the cooked black-eyed peas, diced tomatoes, diced red onion, and grated carrots until evenly mixed.
2. In a separate cup, combine the olive oil, balsamic vinegar, freshly ground black pepper, and ground cumin.
3. Pour the dressing mixture over the vegetables in the bowl.
4. Stir gently to coat all ingredients with the dressing.
5. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
Serves 4
